title: Summit Jacket — Pine
summary: Summit jacket in pine; built in Spain for daily use.

content.text:
# Summit Jacket — Pine

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Summit Jacket — Pine is designed for the long haul, with apparel-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Spain.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
